title: How could El Nino reshape tropical storms around the world this year?
description: El Nino tends to reduce hurricanes in the Atlantic while increasing storms in the Pacific Ocean.
content:
The Atlantic hurricane season has just begun and runs from Monday to November 30 with storm activity peaking in mid-September.
During this period, warm ocean waters and atmospheric shifts feed and a… [+7433 chars]
de: Wie könnte El Nino dieses Jahr tropische Stürme auf der ganzen Welt verändern? El Niño führt tendenziell zu einer Verringerung der Hurrikane im Atlantik und zu einer Zunahme der Stürme im Pazifischen Ozean.
en: How could El Nino reshape tropical storms around the world this year?. El Nino tends to reduce hurricanes in the Atlantic while increasing storms in the Pacific Ocean.
la: Quomodo tempestates tropicae El Nino resilire potuerunt hoc anno circa mundum?. El Nino tendit procellas in Atlantico minuere dum procellas in Oceano Pacifico auget.
